sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6000" key="a)mfiperifqinu/qw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιπερι-φθῐνύθω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <sense id="n6000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">decay, die all around,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Ven.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">271</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
